first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same in both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the same skill gaps (C++, industrial protocols) as the reason for the low score. The minor differences in phrasing, such as using "Severe lack" instead of "Lack of," are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate.
